proposed_relations.description: Both records represent the same First Avenue/Second Avenue SBS/BRT corridor from South Ferry to 125th Street in Manhattan. corridor_first-second-ave-sbs derives from the 2010-03-10 CB3 presentation; corridor_first-second-avenues-brt aggregates across the broader 2009–2010 BRT outreach series for the same project.

evidence_refs.source_quote: A map of the First Avenue/Second Avenue SBS corridor in Manhattan, showing the route from South Ferry to 125th Street.
8.5 miles from South Ferry to 125 th Street

decisions.rationale: The observation describes the First Avenue/Second Avenue SBS corridor from South Ferry to 125th Street in Manhattan — the identical geographic scope (same streets, same limits, same borough) as corridor_first-second-avenues-brt. Both records cover the M15 SBS/BRT corridor; the observation's source is one CB3 presentation within the broader outreach campaign captured by corridor_first-second-avenues-brt. The two records are the same real-world corridor.

evidence_refs.source_quote: A map of the First Avenue/Second Avenue SBS corridor in Manhattan, showing the route from South Ferry to 125th Street.
8.5 miles from South Ferry to 125 th Street
